mainEntity.name: What is the penalty for late ITR filing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Late filing fee of Rs 5,000 under Section 234F (Rs 1,000 if total income is below Rs 5 lakhs). Additionally, interest under Section 234A at 1% per month on unpaid tax. Loss carry-forward (except house property loss) is also forfeited if return is filed late.

mainEntity.name: Do you handle high-value ITR with multiple capital gains?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We handle returns with hundreds of equity/MF transactions, real estate capital gains with multiple properties, and unlisted share transfers. We reconcile broker statements, compute holding periods, and apply correct tax rates for each category.

mainEntity.name: Can you help with ITR for Mumbai-based NRIs?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We handle NRI ITR filing including rental income from Mumbai property, capital gains on property sale, NRO/NRE interest taxation, DTAA benefit claims, and TDS refund applications under Section 195/197.
